summary.headline: PRM is deterministically attested conformant to PNA Spec 0.2 for its declared flavor: 15 conformant, 4 not-applicable, 0 non-conformant across 20 evaluated ACs. 1 AC(s) carry self-attested partial-conformance flagged for human review (AC-PRM-A); the EX-CLOUD-LLM exception is handled by a workspace consent gate + persistent signal + reversible return-to-PNA over a projection-bound, consent-gated cloud surface (the data-floor) — the residual boundary is consent + honest signaling, since an MCP server cannot identify the consuming LLM).
